dct_description_sm: This is a digital index map to serve as a finding aid for Africa 1:2,000,000 / reproduced under the direction of the Chief of Engineers by the Army Map Service, U.S. Army, Washington, D.C.  Based on British and French maps.
schema_provider_s: American Geographical Society Library – UWM Libraries
